title: Trip Dots
subtitle: Visualizing my travel history in the globe
summary:
A map-based visualization of my travel history in the world for the pass four years. I always want to create such a visualization to track all my trips and travel vlogs by geological location.

Mostly my trips are around the Pacific Ocean, and I have been to China, Japan, Canada, United States and Puerto Rico for the past four years.
